name: Jumbo Group Limited
summary: Jumbo Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates and manages a network of restaurants in Singapore, the People's Republic of China, Taiwan, and internationally. It operates 39 food and beverages (F&B) outlets under the JUMBO Seafood, NG AH SIO Bak Kut Teh, HACK IT, Chui Huay Lim Teochew Cuisine, Zui Yu Xuan Teochew Cuisine, Chao Ting, Kok Kee Wanton Noodle, Singapore Seafood Republic, and XINYAO Hainanese Chicken Rice restaurant brands in Singapore, Shanghai, Xi'an, Beijing, Fuzhou, Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh, Seoul, Ilsan, Taipei, Taichung, Hsinchu, Taoyuan, Tokyo and Osaka. The company also operates 2 Cha Chaan Teng outlet as a franchisee, as well as manages 1 Singapore Seafood Republic outlet in Singapore. In addition, it sells packaged sauces and spice mixes in its outlets, selected stores, supermarkets, travel agencies, and online through JUMBO eShop and e-commerce stores, as well as offers catering services in Singapore. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Singapore.
